mapper.insert: INSERT INTO face_check_record (elder_id, check_time, result, photo_url, photo_data) VALUES (#{elderId}, #{checkTime}, #{result}, #{photoUrl}, #{photoData})
mapper.update: UPDATE face_check_record SET elder_id = #{elderId}, check_time = #{checkTime}, result = #{result}, photo_url = #{photoUrl}, photo_data = #{photoData} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, elder_id, check_time, result, photo_url, photo_data FROM face_check_record WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} ORDER BY check_time DESC
SELECT id, elder_id, check_time, result, photo_url, photo_data FROM face_check_record WHERE elder_id = #{elderId} AND DATE(check_time) = CURDATE() ORDER BY check_time DESC
SELECT id, elder_id, check_time, result, photo_url, photo_data FROM face_check_record WHERE DATE(check_time) = #{date} ORDER BY check_time DESC
SELECT id, elder_id, check_time, result, photo_url, photo_data FROM face_check_record ORDER BY check_time DESC

SELECT fcr.id, fcr.elder_id, fcr.check_time, fcr.result, fcr.photo_url, fcr.photo_data, e.name as elder_name, e.age as elder_age, e.gender as elder_gender FROM face_check_record fcr LEFT JOIN elder e ON fcr.elder_id = e.id WHERE fcr.elder_id = #{elderId} AND fcr.photo_data IS NOT NULL ORDER BY fcr.check_time DESC
